'''Alderaan Royal Engineers''' was one of the pre-eminent [[starshipwright]]s during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. They were renowned for their design work with large-scale [[Capital ship/Legends|capital]] [[Warship/Legends|warships]] and smaller [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] alike.

==Description==
Alderaan Royal Engineers was one of the premier and most recognizable [[Starship/Legends|starship]] builders throughout much of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] existence.<ref name="EGVV" /> The company maintained a [[Alderaan Royal Engineers shipyard|shipyard]] with 325 construction slips.<ref name="SG2001" />

==Products==
Alderaan Royal Engineers were responsible for producing several designs of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], but were most known for their lines of luxury [[Yacht/Legends|yachts]], [[Space station/Legends|space stations]]—such as the [[Esseles-class space station|''Esseles''-class space station]], and exotic craft.<ref name="EGVV" /> They were also a manufacturer of starship component parts, including the [[LF9 ion engine]] used by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive's]] [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]].<ref name="SWS" />

==History==
Formed sometime before [[20,000 BBY/Legends|20,000 BBY]],<ref name="SG2001" /> Alderaan Royal Engineers was one of the prominent starshipwrights in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the height of the Galactic Republic. As the Republic waned, and newer companies such as [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] came to the fore, Alderaan Royal Engineers found itself overshadowed by its more aggressive competitors. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Republic's successor state, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and the insurgent [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], Alderaan Royal Engineers were part of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] rearmament program, the planet having taken to pacifism in the aftermath of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The company ceased operation shortly after Alderaan was [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="EGVV" />
